response.justification: The candidate is a skilled senior software engineer with a diverse background in web technologies, particularly Node.js, TypeScript, and Dlang. However, he is a very poor fit for this specific role. He critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience, with only a brief 7-month role listed many years ago. Furthermore, he has no experience in the required capital markets or fixed-income domains, and his resume does not show the specified expertise in C++ on Windows or with SQL Server/Oracle.
strengths: Demonstrates strong seniority and a broad skill set in modern web and backend technologies.
Excellent communication skills, evidenced by creating and delivering workshops and technical talks.
Proficient in modern software development practices, including CI/CD, TDD, and containerization.
concerns: Almost no professional C++ experience; the resume shows only one 7-month C++ role from 2015.
Complete lack of experience in the required financial domains like capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income.
No demonstrated experience developing on the Windows platform or using the specified SQL Server/Oracle databases.

key_factors.factor: No Capital Markets/Fixed Income Domain Knowledge
Missing Windows Platform & Specific SQL Skills
